headline: What to Expect From Kroger's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Kroger is expected to publish its first-quarter results soon, and analysts project a single-digit earnings rise.

raw.headline: What to Expect From Kroger's Next Quarterly Earnings Report

headline: JBS faces another US strike
summary: The workers at Denver Processing, represented by UFCW Local 7, voted 97% to authorise the walkout.
